name: Snap
philosophy: Snap's web presence is camera-first augmented-reality chrome — Snap Yellow (#fffc00) as the brand voltage, a clean white canvas, and a layout grammar that puts the camera (Snapchat the app, Spectacles the hardware, AR Lenses the product) at the center. The atmosphere is youthful camera-tech: every page sells the camera as the input device for AR, social, and creativity.

design_language.motion_signature: Camera-grade motion — AR Lens previews auto-play in product mockups, hero photography may have subtle ken-burns pans (5-second cycles). Hover lift on cards (1.03 scale + 200ms ease). The motion is camera-shutter snappy.

trademark_signals: Snap Yellow (#fffc00) — the brand voltage on chrome and the ghost mascot
Snapchat ghost mascot — the iconic ghost icon, brand-mark anchor
Camera-first layout — every page leads with the camera as input
AR Lens previews — auto-playing camera-effects mockups demonstrating the product
Avenir Next typography — geometric humanist sans with personality
ai_slop_avoided: Don't replace the Snapchat ghost with a generic icon — it is brand identity
Don't tint Snap Yellow — the specific saturated #fffc00 is brand
Don't sharpen card radii below 8px — youth-tech softness
Don't sanitize the camera-first layout — AR is the brand category
